title: Director tick #2 substrate (behaviour-note + roster-truth): compaction cascade absorbed; verification asks discharged; knip RED blocks coherence surfacing; Ashen routed fan-out dispatch
body:
Director tick #2 substrate event (behaviour-note + roster-truth update). Authority window: 15:08:42Z onward; this is the first substrate tick after the standing-direction tick #1 at 15:10:02Z.

## Compaction cascade absorbed (3 team-member closeouts in 3 minutes)

Owner-directed compaction cascade across the team. Three substantive closeout broadcasts landed:

1. **Twilit Scattering Twilight** (15:08:58Z, event prefix matches `b4` thread) — closed; retained claim `26433756` on `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/session-open-env-freshness-check.plan.md` (FM-2 P2 plan v2; awaiting Director verdict on routing options (a/b/c) per their 14:07:35Z surface). PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE substrate preserved; continuous identity expected on resume.

2. **Charcoal Brazing Kiln** (15:09:27Z) — closed; no retained claims (Watchman + general-support are pure-observation roles); two Wilma adversarial dispatches landed (Class B authorisation `a99cfb6db9cf2afee`; Ferny pattern file `a87d0df8c0f137bae`); explicitly DID NOT dispatch plan-Wilma on Twilit ST's FM-2 P2 plan per their closeout outputs section.

3. **Ferny Fruiting Root** (15:11:43Z) — closed; retained claim `ebc446c6` on pattern file v2 (`substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state.md`); plan-Wilma verdict on FM-2 P2 plan IS in hand from Ferny's earlier dispatch (subagent transcript `a2e16a2e367255e07`; verdict SAFE-WITH-CONDITIONS, 4 SAFE + 2 UNSAFE findings; routing-disposition surfaced to Scorched at `c8f84c67` and accepted at Scorched 15:04:03Z directed reply "kept alongside Charcoal's pending dispatch as additional input").

## Scorched's verification asks at 15:06:32-33Z — both answered by closeout substrate

Scorched's pre-handover verification discipline ("don't trust, verify") asked both Twilit ST and Charcoal for concrete artefacts. Both closeout broadcasts surfaced the artefacts:

- **Twilit ST**: Wilma dispatch was NOT what they were doing this window; they were authoring the FM-2 P2 plan v2 after Scorched's 13:56:07Z routing; dual-reviewer dispatch (assumptions-expert + architecture-expert-fred) returned in parallel; v2 surfaced to Scorched at 14:07:35Z. Plan-Wilma was Ferny's dispatch (substrate above).
- **Charcoal**: Plan-Wilma NOT dispatched. Their two Wilma dispatches were Class B authorisation (id `a99cfb6db9cf2afee`) and Ferny pattern file (id `a87d0df8c0f137bae`). Plan-Wilma slot was not taken; Ferny's verdict is the canonical one for the 5th coherence component.

Verification-asks both discharged. The 5th coherence component is COMPOSED.

## Active roster post-cascade

| Agent | Status | Verified evidence | Retained claim |
|---|---|---|---|
| Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4) | **Director (incoming)** | Moment 2 broadcast at 15:08:42Z; tick #1 at 15:10:02Z; tick #2 (this event) | none |
| Ashen Brazing Crucible (53dad4) | **commit marshal (active; blocked on knip RED)** | pnpm-check broadcast at 15:12:07Z; running cure-investigation per my 15:13Z directed routing | none (cure-cycle pending) |
| Ferny Fruiting Root (ee16a4) | compacted | closeout broadcast 15:11:43Z | `ebc446c6` on pattern file v2 |
| Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) | compacted | closeout broadcast 15:08:58Z | `26433756` on FM-2 P2 plan v2 |
| Charcoal Brazing Kiln (7c7327) | compacted | closeout broadcast 15:09:27Z | none |
| Scorched Tempering Kiln (52b263) | **outgoing Director (Moment 2 ratified)** | Moment 1 broadcast at 15:08:05Z; cron `58c741a1` self-ended at Moment 2 per their broadcast | none |

Active operational team: 2 (Director + Marshal). Three retained-claim holders in compaction. The skeleton-crew window has begun.

## Knip RED at HEAD `db4d8b3a` (blocker for compaction-prep + owner-coherence-moment surfacing)

Ashen's broadcast at 15:12:07Z: pnpm-check turbo GREEN (108/108) + post-turbo RED on knip — 3 unused exports in watcher-heartbeat infrastructure (attributed to commit `86f340b5`, Twilit ST's cure-bundle-v2):

- `watcherHeartbeatSchema` at `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/watcher-heartbeat.ts:94:10`
- `WatcherErrorKind` at `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/comms-use-cases.ts:8:8`
- `WatcherIdentity` at `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/watcher-heartbeat.ts:54:13`

The names are public-API-shaped (Schema, Kind, Identity suffixes on exported symbols from a foundational infrastructure module). Per `feedback_no_cheap_cure_option`: strip-them-to-pass-knip is the cheap-cure (banned); the architectural-excellence cure is preserve-the-API-surface + knip-config-exception. Per `feedback_all_quality_gates_blocking_always`: the RED state is blocking regardless of cause; "pre-existing, out-of-scope" framing is the recurring failure mode.

## Routing decision: Director → Ashen (15:13Z directed event `59de4a67`)

Per Director-pure-direction discipline + the just-broadcast standing direction encouraging fan-out subagents, I have routed to Ashen a fan-out dispatch ask:

- `code-expert` — gateway: public-API vs orphan-strippable
- `type-expert` — canonical types for heartbeat surface vs incidental
- `architecture-expert-fred` — workspace public-API boundary discipline

Three Agent-tool invocations in parallel in a single message; ~5–8 min wall-clock. Ashen retains the override (they can author the cure directly if their substrate closes the question without the dispatch). Marshal-cycle on the cure (whichever shape) is Ashen's.

## Owner-coherence-moment status: 5/5 COMPOSED but surfacing BLOCKED behind knip-cure landing

| # | Component | Status |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Charcoal C2/C5 architectural-direction broadcast (14:28:55Z) | ✓ ready |
| 2 | Ashen throughput-cure substrate broadcast (14:55:45Z) | ✓ ready |
| 3 | Pattern v2 ship-verdict (Ferny self-attest 15:01:06Z + Charcoal Wilma synthesis 14:30Z) | ✓ ready |
| 4 | PDR-076 v2 LANDED `db4d8b3a` + (C) SPLIT open question | ✓ ready |
| 5 | Twilit ST FM-2 P2 plan v2 + plan-Wilma verdict (Ferny dispatch `a2e16a2e367255e07` SAFE-WITH-CONDITIONS) | ✓ ready |

All five components are present in the substrate. The surfacing to owner is held until the knip-cure lands (signal hygiene: surfacing a coherence bundle with a tree-RED state contradicts the bundle's own evidentiary quality).

## Standing direction reminders (from tick #1 + carried forward)

- Default to specialist sub-agent dispatch for all review passes / design verifications / architectural decisions / assumption checks
- Default to fan-out (parallel multi-agent dispatch) when artefact warrants multiple perspectives — single message, multiple Agent tool calls
- Surface subagent transcript ids when reporting back (concrete-artefact verification per 15:03Z owner correction "don't trust, verify")
- All quality gates blocking, always — knip RED IS a session-blocker, not an out-of-scope pre-existing
- Coordinator delegates sub-agent launches — Director routes to team-member; team-member executes

## Director-cadence exit criterion (per templated-loops-need-exit-criteria standing rule)

Idle-tick counter: 0 (this tick had substantive routing). Canonical default: 5 consecutive idle ticks → stand down + closeout broadcast. Idle defined as: no new comms requiring routing + no owner direction + no tree-state change within ~10 min.

## Single highest-priority action

Ashen's fan-out dispatch verdict + cure-cycle on the knip RED. When tree returns to GREEN, the owner-coherence-moment surfaces as a single bundle to owner.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (Director, tick #2)
